title: Actually Vanilla
description: A modpack that improves Performance, Audio, Utility, and Visuals without losing the vanilla experience by only using client-side mods.
body:
Have you ever thought that vanilla Minecraft feels too outdated and laggy? But then when you try those vanilla+ Modpacks they change too much of the game that it doesn't even feel vanilla anymore? Well this Modpack is probably what's right for you. This Modpack improves your gameplay without altering the vanilla style by only adding client-side mods. Adds Performance, Audio, Utility, and Visuals with high configurability.

# **Modlist and Features**
Mods marked with 🔧 are highly recommended to be tweaked with the configurations and settings to suit your preference.
<details>
<summary>Audio</summary>
  
- 🔧[Ambient Sounds](https://modrinth.com/mod/ambientsounds) - Adds a rich ambiance to the Minecraft world by adding ambient sounds.
- 🔧[Infinite Music](https://modrinth.com/mod/infinite-music) - Allows changing the delay between Minecraft music playing. 
- [Presence Footsteps](https://modrinth.com/mod/presence-footsteps) - Adds a more varied and rich footsteps SFX.
- [Sound Physics Remastered](https://modrinth.com/mod/sound-physics-remastered) - Provides realistic sound attenuation, reverberation, and absorption through blocks.
- [Sounds](https://modrinth.com/mod/sound) - Adds a variety of new sound effects and improves existing ones that don't quite fit.

</details>

<details>
<summary>Utility</summary>
  
- [Accurate Block Placement Reborn](https://modrinth.com/mod/accurate-block-placement-reborn) - Makes block placement smarter by timing it for you.
- [Antique Atlas 4](https://modrinth.com/mod/antique-atlas-4) - Adds an unobtrusive map that doesn't give out too much information that ruins the fun of exploration.
- [Better Third Person](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-third-person) - Allows you to freely rotate the 3rd person camera and walk in 8 directions. 
- [Bridging Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/bridging-mod) - Reacharound Placement / Bedrock Bridging for Fabric, Forge & Quilt with a few extra tweaks
- [Cherished Worlds](https://modrinth.com/mod/cherished-worlds) - adds the ability to favorite/pin/bookmark certain worlds.
- [Click Through 2.0](https://modrinth.com/mod/clickthrough2.0) - Allows you to click through signs, item frames, and wall banners to access chests.
- 🔧[Client Tweaks](https://modrinth.com/mod/client-tweaks) - Adds a bunch of optional tweaks to improve the Quality of Life during gameplay.
- ~~[Controlify](https://modrinth.com/mod/controlify) - Adds controller support.~~ **Temporarily disabled due to bug.**
- [Cubes Without Borders](https://modrinth.com/mod/cubes-without-borders) - Allows you to play Minecraft in a borderless fullscreen window.
- 🔧[Do a Barrel Roll](https://modrinth.com/mod/do-a-barrel-roll) - Changes elytra flight to be more fun and semi-realistic.
- [e4mc](https://modrinth.com/mod/e4mc) - Allows you to host your LAN world as a server to the internet.
- [Fabrishot](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabrishot) - Allows you to take 4K screenshots.
- [Freecam](https://modrinth.com/mod/freecam) - Allows you to control your camera separately from your player.
- [Invmove](https://modrinth.com/mod/invmove) - Enables moving, jumping, sprinting, etc. from within inventories. Also adds blur when inventories are opened.
- [Lightweight Inventory Sorting](https://modrinth.com/mod/lightweight-inventory-sorting) - Adds a simple inventory sorting function.
- [Mixintrace](https://modrinth.com/mod/mixintrace) - Adds a list of mixins to classes in the stack trace to crash reports.
- [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu) - Adds a mod menu allowing you to view and configure mods easily.
- [More Chat History](https://modrinth.com/mod/morechathistory) - Increases the maximum length of the chat history.
- [Mouse Tweaks](https://modrinth.com/mod/mouse-tweaks) - Replaces the standard RMB dragging mechanic, adds two new LMB dragging mechanics and the ability to quickly move items with the scroll wheel.
- [No Chat Reports](https://modrinth.com/mod/no-chat-reports) - Makes chat ureportable when possible.
- [No Resource Pack Warnings](https://modrinth.com/mod/no-resource-pack-warnings) - Get rid of the red borders around outdated resource/data packs and skip pop-up warnings when applying them.
- [Polytone](https://modrinth.com/mod/polytone) - allows tweaking various aspects of the game via Resource Packs.
- [Reese's Sodium Options](https://modrinth.com/mod/reeses-sodium-options) - Replaces Sodium's Options Screen with intention of improving UX.
- [Resourcify](https://modrinth.com/mod/resourcify) - Allows you to browse all resource packs, data packs, and shaders on Modrinth and CurseForge in Minecraft.
- [RyoamicLights](https://modrinth.com/mod/ryoamiclights) - Adds dynamic lights without the need for shaders.
- [Your Options Shall Be Respected](https://modrinth.com/mod/yosbr) - Provide default options if the corresponding option file doesn't exist.
- [Zoomify](https://modrinth.com/mod/zoomify) - Adds a zoom function.

</details>

<details>
<summary>Visuals</summary>

**Blocks**
- [Animatica](https://modrinth.com/mod/animatica) - Allows the Fabric mod loader to load the MCPatcher/OptiFine animated texture format.
- [Continuity](https://modrinth.com/mod/continuity) - Allows resource packs that use the OptiFine connected textures format, OptiFine emissive textures forma, or OptiFine custom block layers format to work without OptiFine.

**Environment**
- [Cave Dust](https://modrinth.com/mod/cave-dust) - Adds the white ash particle from the Basalt Deltas biome to the underground to simulate dust.
- [Explosive Enhancement](https://modrinth.com/mod/explosive-enhancement) - Adds a cooler-looking explosion animation.
- [FabricSkyBoxes](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabricskyboxes) - Allows resource packs to define custom skyboxes.
- [FabricSkyBoxes Interop](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabricskyboxes-interop) - FabricSkyBoxes Interoperability for MCPatcher/OptiFine Skies
- [Iris](https://modrinth.com/mod/iris) - Allows the use of shaders.
- 🔧[Particular](https://modrinth.com/mod/particular) - Enhances Minecraft's ambiance with many visual effects.
- [RyoamicLights](https://modrinth.com/mod/ryoamiclights) - LambDynamicLights unofficial architectury port. A dynamic lights mod for Minecraft.
- [Satin Free Wakes](https://modrinth.com/mod/satin-free-wakes) - Satin free version of the Wakes mod. Which adds splashes and wakes while traveling on water. 3x fps of normal version.
- 🔧[Visuality](https://modrinth.com/mod/visuality) - improves visuals by adding a bunch of new particles.

**GUI**
- [Advancements Plaques](https://modrinth.com/mod/advancement-plaques) - Replaces advancement popups with something flashier.
- [AppleSkin](https://modrinth.com/mod/appleskin) - Improves Food/hunger-related HUD.
- 🔧[Auto HUD](https://modrinth.com/mod/autohud) - Dynamically hides parts of the user interface.
- 🔧[Better F3](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-f3) - This mod reduces clutter on the F3 debug menu.
- [Better Mount HUD](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-mount-hud) - Improves the ingame HUD while riding a mount.
- [Better Stats](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-stats) - Replaces the Vanilla statistics screen with an improved statistics screen that is easier to use.
- 🔧[Dynamic Crosshair](https://modrinth.com/mod/dynamiccrosshair) - Hides and changes the crosshair depending on the context.
- [Effect Timer Plus](https://modrinth.com/mod/effecttimerplus) - Adds a potency and time indicator overlay to status effect icons.
- [Enhanced Visuals](https://modrinth.com/mod/enhancedvisuals) - Provides a more immersive experience by adding effects to the HUD.
- [Flow](https://modrinth.com/mod/flow) - Adds inventory UI transitions.
- [Held Item Info](https://modrinth.com/mod/held-item-info) - Shows information (like enchantments) about the held item under its name.
- [Immersive UI](https://modrinth.com/mod/immersive-ui) - Adds animated UI components.
- [Optigui](https://modrinth.com/mod/optigui) - Allows custom GUI resource pack.
- [Paginated Advancements](https://modrinth.com/mod/paginatedadvancements) - Improves the advancements screen.
- [Pick Up Notifier](https://modrinth.com/mod/pick-up-notifier) - Adds a pickup log, a neat list shown in the corner of your screen.
- [Shulker Box Tooltip](https://modrinth.com/mod/shulkerboxtooltip) - Allows viewing the contents of shulker boxes from your inventory.
- [Smooth Scrolling](https://modrinth.com/mod/smooth-scroll) - Smoothens out the scrolling animation.


**Items**
- [CIT Resewn](https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn) - Re-implements MCPatcher's CIT.
- [Item Borders](https://modrinth.com/mod/item-borders) - Add colored borders to inventory slots to make your rare items stand out.
- [Item Highlighter](https://modrinth.com/mod/item-highlighter) - Highlights newly picked-up items.
- [Legendary Tooltips](https://modrinth.com/mod/legendary-tooltips) - Adds fancier tooltips for items.
- [Variants CIT](https://modrinth.com/mod/variants-cit) - CIT logic for items with standardized variants.

**Mobs**
- [Entity Model Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features) - Allows OptiFine format, Custom Entity Model replacement in resourcepacks.
- [Entity Texture Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures) - Adds Emissive, Random & Custom texture support for entities in resourcepacks.

**Player**
- 🔧[Camera Overhaul](https://modrinth.com/mod/cameraoverhaul) - Adds movement tilt to the camera.
- [Capes](https://modrinth.com/mod/capes) - Lets you use capes from OptiFine, LabyMod and other cape mods.
- [Eating Animation](https://modrinth.com/mod/eating-animation) - Adds sprite animations for edible and drinkable items.
- [First Person Model](https://modrinth.com/mod/first-person-model) - Enables the third-person Model in first-person.
- 🔧[Not Enough Animations](https://modrinth.com/mod/not-enough-animations) - Bringing first-person animations to the third-person.
- [3D Skin Layers](https://modrinth.com/mod/3dskinlayers) - Renders the player skin layer in 3D.
- [YDM's Weapon Master](https://modrinth.com/mod/weaponmaster) - Shows hotbar items on your Character.

</details>

<details>
<summary>Performance and Fixes</summary>

- [BadOptimizations](https://modrinth.com/mod/badoptimizations) - Optimization mod that focuses on things other than rendering.
- [Better Beds](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-beds) - Changes the renderer of the bed to use JSON models instead of a block entity render.
- [Concurrent Chunk Management Engine](https://modrinth.com/mod/c2me-fabric) - A Fabric mod designed to improve the chunk performance of Minecraft.
- [Cull Leaves](https://modrinth.com/mod/cull-leaves) - Adds culling to leaf blocks, providing a huge performance boost over vanilla.
- [Debugify](https://modrinth.com/mod/debugify) - Fixes Minecraft bugs found on the bug tracker
- [Dynamic FPS](https://modrinth.com/mod/dynamic-fps) - Reduce resource usage while Minecraft is in the background or idle.
- [Enhanced Block Entities](https://modrinth.com/mod/ebe) - Reduce block entity FPS lag with almost no compromises, and improve their visuals.
- [Entity Culling](https://modrinth.com/mod/entityculling) - Using async path-tracing to hide Block-/Entities that are not visible.
- [Faster Random](https://modrinth.com/mod/faster-random) - A significantly faster Random Generator implementation for Minecraft, with near vanilla parity.
- [FerriteCore](https://modrinth.com/mod/ferrite-core) - Memory usage optimizations.
- [FeyTweaks](https://modrinth.com/mod/feytweaks) - Mod for optimizing signs and beacons.
- [ImmediatelyFast](https://modrinth.com/mod/immediatelyfast) - Speed up immediate mode rendering in Minecraft.
- [Indium](https://modrinth.com/mod/indium) - Sodium addon providing support for the Fabric Rendering API, based on Indigo.
- [Language Reload](https://modrinth.com/mod/language-reload) - Reduces load times and adds fallbacks for languages.
- [Lithium](https://modrinth.com/mod/lithium) - No-compromises game logic/server optimization mod.
- [Model Gap Fix](https://modrinth.com/mod/modelfix) - Fixes gaps in Block Models and Item Models.
- [ModernFix](https://modrinth.com/mod/modernfix) - Improves performance, reduces memory usage, and fixes many bugs.
- [Noisium](https://modrinth.com/mod/noisium) - Optimises worldgen performance for a better gameplay experience.
- [Remove Reloading Screen](https://modrinth.com/mod/rrls) - Makes resource packs load in the background.
- [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium) - The fastest and most compatible rendering optimization mod for Minecraft.
- [Sodium Extra](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium-extra) - A Sodium addon that adds features that shouldn't be in Sodium.
</details>

<details>
<summary>Libraries</summary>

- [Architectuary API](https://modrinth.com/mod/architectury-api) - Required by 'Jamlib' and 'Octolib'.
- [Balm](https://modrinth.com/mod/balm) - Required by 'Client Tweaks'.
- [Cicada](https://modrinth.com/mod/cicada) - Required by 'Do a Barrel Roll'.
- [Cloth Config](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config) - Required by 'Mod Menu'.
- [CreativeCore](https://modrinth.com/mod/creativecore) - Required by 'Ambient Sounds'.
- [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) - Required to use fabric mod loader.
- [Fabric Language Kotlin](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-language-kotlin) - Required by 'Capes', 'OptiGUI', 'Resourcify', and 'Zoomify'.
- [Forge Config API Port](https://modrinth.com/mod/forge-config-api-port)Required by 'Puzzles'.
- [Iceberg](https://modrinth.com/mod/iceberg) - Required by 'Advancement Plaques' and 'Legendary Tooltips'.
- [M.R.U.](https://modrinth.com/mod/mru) - Required by 'Flow' and 'Sounds'.
- [ObsidianUI](https://modrinth.com/mod/obsidianui) - Required by 'RyoamicLights'.
- [OctoLib](https://modrinth.com/mod/octo-lib) - Required by 'Immersive UI'.
- [oωo (owo-lib)](https://modrinth.com/mod/owo-lib) - Required by 'Particular'.
- [Text Placeholder API](https://modrinth.com/mod/placeholder-api) - Placeholder and Text manipulation library for your Minecraft mods.
- [Prism](https://modrinth.com/mod/prism-lib) - Required by 'Legendary Tooltips'.
- [Puzzles Lib](https://modrinth.com/mod/puzzles-lib) - Required by 'Pickup Notifier'.
- [Surveyor Map Framework](https://modrinth.com/mod/surveyor) - Required by 'Antique Atlas 4'.
- [TCDCommons API](https://modrinth.com/mod/tcdcommons) - Required by 'Better Statistics Screen'.
- [YetAnotherConfigLib](https://modrinth.com/mod/yacl) - Required by 'Zoomify', 'Debugify', and 'Controlify'.

</details>

# **Resource Packs**
Packs marked with ⚙️ impact your performance. If you prefer better performance then you should remove it. 

### **Lists in the order it should be loaded in Minecraft**:
<details>
<summary>Texture Packs</summary>
  
- ⚙️ [FancyFast Bushy Leaves](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fancyfast-bushy-leaves) - Optimized bushy leaves and mangrove roots.
- [Fast Better Grass](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fast-better-grass) - Makes grass and related blocks use the top texture on the sides.
- Default Sound Pack - Provided by 'Presence Footsteps' mod
- Minecraft/Supporteatinganimation - Provided by 'Eating Animation' mod
- Better Beds - Provided by the 'Better Beds' mod
- [Better Boats](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/better-boats) - Adds a more accurate boat model.
- [Pixelated Enhanced Visuals](https://modrinth.com/mod/enhancedvisuals) - A pixelated version of enhanced visual graphics.
- [Chat Reporting Helper](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/chat-reporting-helper) - An educational tool that explains chat reporting in a simple and neutral way.
- Cull Leaves - Provided by 'Cull Leaves' mod
- [Clean Connected Glass](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/clean-connected-glass) - Adds connected glass without the streaks in the middle.
- Glass Pane Culling Fix - Provided by Continuity
- Default Connected Textures - Provided by Continuity
- [Expressive Fresh Moves](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/tras-fresh-player) - Adds player model animation with expression support for certain skins.
- [Better Zombies](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/better-zombies) - Adds way more zombie variants.
- [Fresh Skeleton Physics](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-skeleton-physics) - Give skeletons physics
- [Biome'd Creepers](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/biomed-creepers) - An EMF resource pack that gives creepers a new look, unique to many biomes! Supports Fresh Animations!
- [Drodi's Illagers FA](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/drodis-illagers-fresh-animation) - Adds animation and fancy models for the raid army mobs. **Requires Fresh Animation**
- [Drodi's Villagers FA](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/drodis-villagers-fa) - Adds fancy models for villagers. **Requires Fresh Animation**
- [FA + All Extensions](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations-extensions) - Adds more animations for mobs and details. Removed chest and its variants animations to allow Enhanced Block Entities mod to work. **Requires Fresh Animation**
- ⚙️ [Fresh Animations](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations) - Adds tons of custom animations for most mobs.
- [Torches Reimagined](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/torches-reimagined) - Makes the torch model 3D and animated when holding in hand for first-person-model.
- [KnightArmor](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/spryzeens-knight-armor) - Adds knight armors.
- [Xali's Potions](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/xalis-potion) - Adds custom potion bottles texture to make it more distinguishable from one another. Uses the [Variants CIT fork](https://modrinth.com/mod/variants-cit) to work.
- [xali's Enchanted Books](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/xalis-enchanted-books) - A small CIT that attributes custom textures to enchanted books to be more identifiable. Uses the [Variants CIT fork](https://modrinth.com/mod/variants-cit) to work.
- [Enchant Icons](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/enchant-icons-countxd) - Makes enchantment names have icons and colors for enchanted books and items and colored enchanting.
- [xali's Enhanced Biome River & Pond](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/xalis-enhanced-biome-river-pond) - Replaces some mob and block textures to koi, frog, seagrass, cattails, and algae with some more small addition when in rivers, swamp, and ponds.
- ⚙️ [Vanilla Tweaks 3D Blocks](https://vanillatweaks.net/picker/resource-packs/) - Makes chains, dripstones, amethyst crystals, redstone dust, mace, ladders, rails, sugarcane, iron bars, lily pads, doors, trapdoors, fungi, glow lichen, stone cutter, the sun, and the moon 3D. Vines and Sculk Veigns aren't included due to extremely high-performance impact in jungles and ancient cities.
- [Vanilla Tweaks](https://vanillatweaks.net/picker/resource-packs/) - Changes can be seen [here](https://vanillatweaks.net/share#7tDoVh)
- [GUIRevision](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/gui-revision) - Bringing a fresh design by keeping the simplicity of the default GUI.
- [xali's Enhanced Vanilla](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/xalis-enhanced-vanilla) - Small updates to the base game to make it look a bit more natural with better transition, alternate textures or better models.
- ⚙️ [Farm 3D](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/farm-3d) - Makes crops 3D.
- Fabric Mods

</details>

## **Special Credits**
- Special thanks to the [Fabulously Optimized](https://modrinth.com/modpack/fabulously-optimized) team for listing out the performance mods used as the base of this modpack. Check their Modpack if you only want the performance increase and Optifine parity.
- Special thanks to the [Legacy Launcher Wiki](https://docs.llaun.ch/en/faq/optifine-alternatives) for listing out Optifine alternative mods.
